wordplay_note: The victorious saint — a leader underground
card_description: Nicholas St. James (meaning "St. James = apostle; Nicholas = victory") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Penultimate Truth*. President of the Tom Mix ant tank underground community. Name note: The victorious saint — a leader underground. The honest leader of the deceived — governing in good faith within a lie. First appears in *The Penultimate Truth*.

reference.brief: President of the Tom Mix ant tank underground community
reference.significance: The honest leader of the deceived — governing in good faith within a lie
